nodes.industry: Software Engineering, Project Management, Tech Consulting

nodes.bios: Hi there! My name is Ting Ting Huang and I initiated Spring quarter of my sophomore year here at UCI. In my free time, I enjoy cooking and baking. A fun fact about myself is that I’m a middle child - 5 years younger than my older sibling and 5 years older than my younger sibling! Ask me about hackathons, philosophy, philanthropy, and technology trends at recruitment!
